name: REMAKE | [FemPOV] No matter what you do, no one seems to mind
description:
Remake of [FemPOV] No matter what you do, no one seems to mind

(Female POV) You are an average girl living your normal life. Suddenly one day you fall on the train, and your hands land on a beautiful woman's chest. You apologize to her a hundred times, but she doesn't seem to have noticed anything out of the ordinary. That's when you realize that you can do anything and people will ignore it, even if it's something as outrageous as groping a woman on a public train in the middle of the day. Just what will you do with this newfound power?

Because of popular demand, I made a remake of the FemPov version as well. Doesn't have a lot more tokens than the original but I think it works a lot better. Hope you like it.

It shouldn't talk for you much but it still may happen, so whenever it talks for you, or you get an answer that you don't like make sure to refresh the answer or manually delete and edit it to your liking.
creator: HaruAi
